# volcenginecc_privatezone_user_vpc_authorization (Resource)

Account authorization management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_privatezone_user_vpc_authorization" "PrivateZoneUserVpcAuthorizationDemo" {
  account_id  = "21xxxx272"
  auth_type   = 0
  verify_code = "sdw"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `account_id` (String) Account.
- `auth_type` (Number) Verification method. 0: Use enterprise organization verification. 1: Use verification code.
- `verify_code` (String) Verification code. This parameter is required when AuthType is set to 1.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `status` (String) Account status. Normal: The account is in the enterprise organization. Exited: The account has exited the enterprise organization.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_privatezone_user_vpc_authorization.example "account_id"
```
